description: Forget about endless searching for the perfect router and scrolling through an eternity of reviews and specifications! We have created a single affordable home access point that has all the features you might need for years to come With 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports, 256 MB of RAM and quad-core CPU, hAP ac3 can satisfy even the biggest and most demanding households. With PoE support, it can power or be powered by other devices. There is a 128 MB NAND and a full-size USB port that you can use to add extra storage. The new enclosure allows mounting the device vertically or horizontally. A wall mount set is also included Stop sharing the frequency with all your neighbors! Strong dual-chain dual-band 2.4/5 GHz wireless for concurrent coverage will solve most interference issues in a crowded environment. This is a must-have these days! You can use the 2.4 GHz channel for older devices and the 5 GHz channel for everything else, since this frequency is less cluttered Device Power adapter 24V/1.5A Base leg / pad Screws
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 25 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Detachable Antenna gain [dBi] 5 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (2) RSMA female LAN speed (5) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet 18 .. 28V DC PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE Out ports 1 PoE budget [W] 18 Max. power consumption [W] 12 Power via connector/terminal 12 .. 28V DC Physical characteristics Design Desktop Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset, mode Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 251 Height [mm] 39 Depth [mm] 129 Hardware CPU IPQ-4019 CPU frequency [MHz] 716 CPU cores 4 Internal storage [MB] 128 RAM [MB] 256
